content:
Fun idanwo iparun rere lododun (annual attrition test) ti o nlo ipin idiyele idinku meji-ọna (two-way discount rate) lati jẹrisi iye ododo ẹka iroyin, yiyan ipin mẹta-tẹ (three-tier rate) tabi marun-tẹ (five-tier rate) da lori iwọn ati idiju ile-iṣẹ naa.

Fun ile-iṣẹ ile-iṣẹ alabọde, o jẹ deede lati lo ipin mẹta-tẹ nitori:

1. **Iwọn ati idiju**: Ile-iṣẹ alabọde maa n ni awọn ipele diẹ ninu awọn oṣiṣẹ ati awọn ipo, nitorina ipin mẹta-tẹ le pese ipin to dara ti idinku laisi ṣiṣe ilana naa nira ju.

2. **Iṣakoso ati irọrun**: Ipin mẹta-tẹ jẹ rọrun lati ṣakoso ati ṣe itupalẹ,
